name: delta9digital/delta9-digital-blocks-plugin
description: This repository contains all the tools you need to build a modern WordPress plugin. Built with the block editor, the code contained within this repository has been designed to enhance functionality specific to a single WordPress project or domain. Extends WordPress features, including Custom post type, Custom Taxonomy, Custom REST API Endpoints, Retrieving data from External API, and Custom blocks to support these features.

scripts.lint: npm run lintJs && npm run lintStyle && composer standards:check -- --filter=gitstaged
